steps.title: Introduce the example list
steps.content: The sentence says geothermal plants use an array of technologies, then gives three examples: one in Indonesia, one in Iceland, and one in the US.

steps.title: Place the colon before examples
steps.content: A creates a comma splice, C wrongly ties the whole array to Indonesia, and D uses a semicolon where a list introduction is needed. The punctuation must open the full series, not only the first location. A colon after "technologies" correctly introduces the examples. The answer is B.
